assertions.assertion: Shows setting options.EmitStaticAudienceClaim = true in the IdentityServer options
assertions.rationale: Does not mention EmitStaticAudienceClaim at all

assertions.assertion: Explains that this emits a static audience claim of '{issuer}/resources'
Mentions the alternative of defining an ApiResource as a more targeted approach
assertions.rationale: Shows ApiResource as the primary approach (which is technically the alternative to EmitStaticAudienceClaim)

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest using the Implicit grant type or any deprecated patterns
